roa.docketEntryComment: /SHER/X:REMAND IN NPT 08-02-02,/NB//CONTD:#22 09-10-02 FOR SUBSTITUTION OF COUNSEL BYRNE IN PLACE OF KOMLOS, AND TO SET/

/CAL FOR PROOF OF ACCEPTANCE IN PROGRAM//X:DEFT PRESENTS PROOF OF ACCEPTANCE INTO SALVATION ARMY PROGRAM,/REIN ORIGTC/PROB MOD/X:DEFENDANT IS TO PARTICIPATE IN THE ONE YEAR RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM,/CONTD: #16 09-09-02 FOR PROGRESS REPORT FROM DEFENDANT ON RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM/

/X:TAGALOG INTERP GRACIANO SEBASTIAN ASSISTS DEFENDANT TODAY,//X:(ON 05-01-02 DEFENDANT ADMITTED PROBATION VIOLATION),//X:PROBATION REMAINS ADMIN'LY REVOKED,/OR//CONTD:FOR PROOF ACCEPTANCE IN SALVATION ARMY RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM/
/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/X:THE COURT MAKES FINDINGS,//X:DEFENSE COUNSEL WILL LOOK FOR A PROGRAM,//CONTD: 05-22-02 #16 TO REINSTATE & MODIFY PROBATION/
/NB/X:CONTD AT REQUEST OF DEFT TO SET IN LIGHT OF DR WOLFSON'S REPORT,//X:DEFT COUNSEL TO PROVIDE COPY OF THE REPORT TO ADA M HALLINAN AND TO APD TULLOCK,/
/NB/X:DEFT COUNSEL KOMLOS TO PROVIDE APD WITH PSYCH REPORT,//X:CONTD TO 04-10-02 0900 #16 FOR FURTHER SR & SET APD MTR,/31    CSUPPL RPT /SUPP:04-10-02/
/CTORD:THAT THIS PROBATION REMAIN INFULL FORCE AND EFFECT,/
CONTD SUPP RPT ON APD MTR/APD-MTR/SUPP:03-12-02/SHER/
CONTD SUPP RPT ON APD MTR/APD-MTR/SUPP:02-01-02/SHER/
